title: selaginella proniflora
intro: Selaginella proniflora is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spikemoss or resurrection fern due to its unique ability to revive itself after drying out. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Selaginella proniflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
